scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.check:structure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['docs/API_SPEC.md','apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma','apps/web/src/App.tsx']; const missing=files.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing required files:\n' + missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('Project structure looks correct.');"
